_meta.description: US-listed Bitcoin mining companies master data
_meta.market_data_note: Stock prices and market caps are approximate as of Feb 2026. For demonstration purposes.

companies.name: Marathon Digital Holdings
companies.description: One of the largest Bitcoin mining companies in North America. Operates large-scale mining facilities with a focus on energy efficiency and sustainability.

companies.name: Riot Platforms
companies.description: One of the largest Bitcoin mining companies in North America, focused on supporting the Bitcoin network through proof-of-work mining.

companies.name: CleanSpark
companies.description: Bitcoin miner focused on sustainable energy. Operates mining facilities across the US with a strong emphasis on low-cost power procurement.

companies.name: Core Scientific
companies.description: One of the largest Bitcoin miners in North America by operating hash rate. Also provides hosting services for other miners. Emerged from bankruptcy in 2024.

companies.name: Cipher Mining
companies.description: US-based Bitcoin mining company focused on building a large-scale mining operation in Texas with access to low-cost energy.

companies.name: Hut 8 Corp
companies.description: Digital asset mining and infrastructure company with operations in North America. Holds a significant BTC treasury.

companies.name: TeraWulf
companies.description: Bitcoin miner focused on zero-carbon energy sources including nuclear and hydroelectric power.

companies.name: Iris Energy
companies.description: Australian-founded but NASDAQ-listed Bitcoin miner operating in North America with a focus on 100% renewable energy.

companies.name: Applied Digital
companies.description: Designs and operates next-generation digital infrastructure including Bitcoin mining and high-performance computing data centers.

companies.name: Bitfarms
companies.description: Bitcoin mining company with operations in North America, South America, and internationally. Known for low-cost power agreements.

companies.name: Bit Digital
companies.description: Bitcoin mining and digital asset company also expanding into AI/HPC cloud services.

companies.name: Bitdeer
companies.description: Technology company for blockchain and high-performance computing. Offers hash rate sharing solutions and mining rig hosting services.

companies.name: HIVE Digital
companies.description: Bitcoin mining company expanding into AI/HPC hosting. Operations in Canada, Sweden, and Iceland with focus on renewable energy.

companies.name: BitFuFu
companies.description: World-leading Bitcoin miner and mining services innovator. Offers cloud hash rate and mining rig hosting solutions.

companies.name: Greenidge Generation
companies.description: Bitcoin miner using waste coal to generate power for mining operations. Environmentally beneficial mining model.

companies.name: American Bitcoin
companies.description: Bitcoin mining company focused on institutional-grade mining operations.

companies.name: Sphere 3D
companies.description: Vertically integrated Bitcoin mining company. Operates mining facilities in the US.

companies.name: Soluna Holdings
companies.description: Developer of green data centers for intensive computing applications including Bitcoin mining and AI. Co-locates with wind, solar, and hydro plants.

companies.name: Hyperscale Data
companies.full_name: Hyperscale Data, Inc. (formerly Ault Alliance / BitNile)
companies.description: Diversified holding company with Bitcoin mining and AI data center operations. Rebranded from Ault Alliance, ticker changed from AULT to GPUS in September 2024.

companies.name: Digi Power X
companies.full_name: Digi Power X Inc. (formerly Digihost Technology)
companies.description: Bitcoin mining and AI infrastructure company. Rebranded from Digihost, ticker changed from DGHI to DGXX in March 2025. ARMS 200 modular data center solution.

companies.name: Mawson Infrastructure
companies.description: Digital infrastructure provider operating Bitcoin mining facilities and data centers in USA and Australia.

companies.name: SAIHEAT
companies.description: Liquid cooling technologies for cryptocurrency and AI computing. Rebranded from SAI.TECH, ticker changed from SAI to SAIH in September 2024.
